title: Tender Egyptian Semolina Cake
description: This cake is a light and chewy Egyptian dessert featuring semolina flour and a touch of pink food coloring, topped with a sweet glaze.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together semolina flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter, eggs, pink food coloring, and salt.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Gradually add the whole milk, stirring until the batter is smooth.
Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch round cake pan.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan.
To make the glaze, whisk together confectioners sugar and water until smooth.
Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake.
